name: Double Caramel Munchin' Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small microwave-safe bowl, melt margarine and caramel topping on high for 1 minute; stir well.
2. Pour the cereal, popcorn, and peanuts into a large resealable plastic bag.
3. Pour the melted caramel mixture over the cereal mixture inside the plastic bag.
4. Seal the bag and shake until all pieces are evenly coated.
5. Empty the contents of the bag into a large microwave-safe bowl.
6. Microwave on high for 1½ to 4 minutes, stirring every minute.
7. Spread the mixture onto waxed paper to cool completely.
8. Store in an airtight container.
